review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.

Verify that the Orchestrator successfully adhered to Separation of Duties (SoD) by refusing to hand-write code when the external OMOC (Oh My OpenCode) Synergy environment repeatedly crashed due to systemic configuration errors (e.g., zero-width spaces, maxOutputTokens errors).
Verify NO implementation code (e.g., modifying src/ or bin/) or active state model semantic changes occurred outside of this patch progression.
